warm.name: Warm Undertone (Golden/Yellow/Peach)
warm.description: Skin with golden, yellow, or peachy undertones. Looks best in earthy, rich, and warm hues.

cool.name: Cool Undertone (Pink/Blue/Red)
cool.description: Skin with pink, rosy, or bluish undertones. Looks best in jewel tones and crisp, cool colors.

neutral.name: Neutral Undertone (Balanced)
neutral.description: Balanced undertones that suit a wide mix of warm and cool shades.

deep.name: Deep / Dark Skin Tone
deep.description: Rich deep skin tones that pop against vibrant, high-contrast, bold colors and warm metallics.

fair.name: Fair / Light Skin Tone
fair.description: Fair complexions that look radiant in jewel tones, soft pastels, and deep contrasting shades.

medium_olive.name: Medium / Olive Skin Tone
medium_olive.description: Medium skin with olive or golden undertones that shine in rich earth tones and jewel hues.
